title: Kebab i Horoskop
overview: A group of misfits from a carpet shop have a chance to change their lives with the help of two marketing experts - an ex-kebab shop worker and an ex-fortune teller from a wildlife magazine.

trailers.title: Kebab & Horoscope by Grzegorz Jaroszuk - Karlovy Vary IFF East of the West Competition 2014
